stories.title: World Cup predictions: 19 ESPN experts make their ...
stories.summary: The World Cup has arrived! It's time for ESPN's experts to make their picks for silverware, surprise results and everything in between.

stories.title: Ian Darke's World Cup preview: Favorites, surprise...
stories.summary: On the eve of the first 48-team World Cup, everyone can dream. But who will win the trophy? And who could surprise us all?

stories.title: LeBron on GOAT debate: Taking nobody over me
stories.summary: LeBron James, when asked for his take on the basketball GOAT debate, said: "I'm not taking nobody over me."

stories.title: USWNT gets scrappy win as Brazil sees 8 red cards
stories.summary: Sophia Wilson forced an own goal in the second half for the United States in a scrappy 1-0 win over Brazil in Fortaleza on Tuesday night in which the home side finished with nine players and was shown a total of eight red cards.

stories.title: Wemby avoids flagrant foul for shoving Brunson
stories.summary: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama will not receive a flagrant foul for his shove to the upper body of Knicks guard Jalen Brunson in Game 3.
